summary.en: A Chinese AI agent platform in the OpenClaw ecosystem, focused on desktop automation and local workflow execution.
summary.zh: OpenClaw 生态中的中文 AI 智能体平台，主打桌面自动化与本地工作流执行。

title.en: Molili - OpenClaw Ecosystem AI Agent Platform | Get Model Key
title.zh: Molili（莫哩哩）- OpenClaw 生态智能体平台 | Get Model Key

description.en: View Molili official site and platform entry in the OpenClaw ecosystem.
description.zh: 查看 Molili 官方站点与平台入口，快速了解 OpenClaw 生态中的中文智能体方案。

benefit.en: Around 2,000 free points are available daily, with token usage often about 30%-50% lower than the original setup (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 每日可领取约 2000 积分，且 Token 消耗相较原版大约降低 30%-50%（以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: Strong OpenClaw compatibility with built-in domestic models, one-click no-code setup, and WeChat/DingTalk remote commands for lightweight workflows.
notes.zh: 对 OpenClaw 能力链路支持完整，内置国产模型，可一键完成零代码安装，并支持微信/钉钉远程下发指令；日常轻量任务基本够用。
